mapper.select: SELECT candidate_id AS candidateId, recommend_request_id AS recommendRequestId, rspu_id AS rspuId, rsku_id AS rskuId, score, ai_reason AS aiReason, match_factors AS matchFactors, status, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM scheme_candidate WHERE recommend_request_id = #{recommendRequestId} ORDER BY score DESC, candidate_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scheme_candidate ( candidate_id, recommend_request_id, rspu_id, rsku_id, score, ai_reason, match_factors, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.candidateId}, #{item.recommendRequestId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.rskuId}, #{item.score}, #{item.aiReason}, #{item.matchFactors, typeHandler=com.rsdp.config.typehandler.JsonbTypeHandler}, #{item.status}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
